title: juncus subulatus
intro: Juncus subulatus, also known as the hair sedge or needle sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy. Juncus subulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried for use in capsules or tinctures, with the dried roots and leaves being commonly used in traditional medicine.
